title: Lucky Charm applies Hit +3 while equipped

plan.title: Lucky Charm applies Hit +3 while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Lucky Charm to a modifier-zero primary creature, run a follow-up battle, and verify the hit roll receives +3.

notes: Place test_primary_creature_mod_0 on player_1 field as primary so the hit modifier comes only from Lucky Charm.

steps: Player 1 plays Lucky Charm and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll modifier.
manualVerification: Confirm the bonus applies only while Lucky Charm remains equipped.
riskNotes: Hit bonuses are battle-roll modifiers and are verified through lastBattle strike output.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate basic Hit equip modifier through a resolved battle roll.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
